name: GRIM.exe

notes: all combat numbers are simulator output on unverified constants
checkpoint levels are provisional (no level timeline in the match feed)
evidence deltas carry finished-inventory survivorship bias

coachLine: Sim-optimal for sustained DPS: first spike lands around minute 12 (Sky Splitter), third item by minute 25. Take Demiurge: +24% on your headline output at minute 15.

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 25 — about 732 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +24% more 10s rotation damage: try Sky Splitter over Lightning Hawk (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for one-combo burst, online around minute 26 — about 894 damage in one combo in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +14% more one-combo burst: try Sky Splitter over Plasma Blade (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 25 — about 306 auto-attack DPS in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees +11% more sustained auto DPS: try Sky Splitter over Lightning Hawk (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: Survive the early checkpoints, concede even trades, and take over once your spike lands.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 38% of its bite; you give up 25% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 21% of its bite; you give up 25% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: Even kill threat throughout: this lane is decided by mechanics and wave control, not scaling.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Tainted Rounds: their 3s all-in loses 21% of its bite; you give up 25% of your damage.

matchups.gameplan: You hold the kill-threat edge wherever one exists: play front-foot, but respect jungle attention.
